CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORTES, VICENTE JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ANTOINE ALLIAUME'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO PLEAD HIS FRAUD CLAIM SPECIFICALLY ENOUGH TO SATISFY PLEADING REQUIREMENTS FOR FRAUD CLAIMS. PLAINTIFF MUST INCLUDE THE FOLLOWING FACTS TO SUPPORT HIS CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD: -HOW DEFENDANT PROMISED TO GIVE PLAINTIFF OWNERSHIP INTEREST IN CURBSIDE. -WHEN DEFENDANT MADE THIS ALLEGED PROMISE. -WHERE DEFENDANT MADE THIS ALLEGED PROMISE. -TO WHOM DID DEFENDANT MAKE THIS PROMISE AND -BY WHAT MEANS THE REPRESENTATIONS WERE MADE. IN ADDITION, THE COURT INDICATED PLAINTIFF HAS 20 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER TO FILE A THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: MITCH LYON, CSR #6840

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-22-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT ANTOINE ALLIAUME'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO PLEAD HIS FRAUD CLAIM SPECIFICALLY ENOUGH TO SATISFY PLEADING REQUIREMENTS FOR FRAUD CLAIMS. PLAINTIFF MUST INCLUDE THE FOLLOWING FACTS TO SUPPORT HIS CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FRAUD:
-HOW DEFENDANT PROMISED TO GIVE PLAINTIFF OWNERSHIP INTEREST IN CURBSIDE.
-WHEN DEFENDANT MADE THIS ALLEGED PROMISE.
-WHERE DEFENDANT MADE THIS ALLEGED PROMISE.
-TO WHOM DID DEFENDANT MAKE THIS PROMISE AND
-BY WHAT MEANS THE REPRESENTATIONS WERE MADE.
In addition, the Court indicated plaintiff has 20 days from notice of entry of order to file a third amended complaint. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ANTOINE ALLIAUME'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF COMPLAINT (Item 2 (3:3-5), Item 4 (3:7-8), Item 6 (3:10) of prayer). No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted with 10 days leave to amend as to Item 4 for plaintiff to plead interest on compensatory damages for unpaid wages. Granted without leave to amend as to Item 2 and Item 6. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
